title: Use Forex to Diversify your Investments
subtitle:
Why put all of your eggs in one basket?
You can lower the risks by using different instruments.
title-1: Why trade Forex with IQ Option?
item-text-1: From Majors to Exotics - we’ve got it all.
item-text-2: A trading safety-net that protects your investments against sudden trend shifts.
item-text-3: Set up the parameters of your trade ahead of time.
item-text-4: You get to invest more money than what you have on hand.
item-text-5: IQ Option offers some of the lowest Forex spreads in the industry.
subtitle-2: This video will help you get started!
